title: Junior Revenue Manager at Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd!
